454 ROUTE_RSDNT_OTHR_CD ROUTE_RSDNT_OTHR_CD Patient Trans - Other Methods CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the transmission route of patient's current reconciled medication list to the patient, family and/or caregiver was an alternate method such as text, email or CD. 0 = No
1 = Yes
^ = Blank
